Ntc Of Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Golden Gate Drywall, Inc.
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs Larry Ken Lee, Richard V. Lucia, Sr., and Robert Bruce Ross.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s)Goden Gate Drywall, Inc.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:
Judgement in favor of Plaintiff Larry Ken Lee and against Defendant Golden Gate Drywall, Inc.
Principal: $2,812.50
Pre-Judgment Interest: $223.46

Judgement in favor of Plaintiff Richard V. Lucia, Sr., and against Defendant Golden Gate Drywall, Inc.
Principal: $10,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $704.11

Judgement in favor of Plaintiff Robert Bruce Ross, and against Defendant Golden Gate Drywall, Inc.
Principal: $15,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,056.16
It is further ordered that Plaintiff is awarded costs in the amount of $560.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $30,356.23
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Continued To May-15-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
